codeReview.summary: The fix correctly addresses the flaky test issue by adding the serial_test crate and using #[serial(key)] attributes to serialize tests that manipulate environment variables. Tests are properly grouped by the env var they touch (spike_token group for SPIKES_TOKEN, api_url group for SPIKES_API_URL_ENV), allowing parallel execution across different groups while preventing races within each group.

summary: Flaky test fix successfully implemented. Added serial_test v3 as a dev-dependency and marked 6 environment-variable-manipulating tests with appropriate #[serial] attributes. Three consecutive test runs all passed, confirming the fix eliminates the race condition. No issues identified.
